chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. D- 1054 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FOR FRESH CASE 1.For orders on M.A No. 5500 of 2025 (U/A) 2.For orders on office objection flag ‘A’ 3.For orders on M.A No. 5501/2025 (E/A) 4.For Hearing of main case. 15.10.2025 Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for the petitioner a/w petitioner. ----------- At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner is serving as a Primary School Teacher (BPS-14) at Government Boys Primary School, Murad Ali Magsi, under Semi Code No. 427050123, and has been regularly performing his duties. He further submits that Respondent No.8, who is the nephew of the petitioner’s father, is a habitual offender with a criminal disposition and harbors personal enmity against the petitioner and his family members. In this regard, FIR No. 33 of 2024 under Sections 337-A(i), 506/2, and 34, PPC has been registered at Police Station Dari, Larkana. Learned counsel contends that due to the prevailing hostility and severe threats to his life, the petitioner cannot discharge his official duties at his current place of posting. He has approached Respondent No.2 through an application dated 24.09.2025 (available at page 23 of the Court file), which remains undecided. Counsel submits that he would be satisfied if Respondent No.2, Secretary Education & Literacy Department, Government of Sindh, is directed to decide the said application expeditiously. Mr Liaquat Ali Shar, learned Additional Advocate General, present in Court, waives notice and records no objection. 2 Accordingly, the petition is disposed of with directions to Respondent No.2 to decide the petitioner’s application within thirty days, strictly in accordance with law, after affording him an opportunity of hearing.

Counsel submits that he would be satisfied if Respondent No.2, Secretary Education & Literacy Department, Government of Sindh, is directed to decide the said application expeditiously. Mr Liaquat Ali Shar, learned Additional Advocate General, present in Court, waives notice and records no objection. 2 Accordingly, the petition is disposed of with directions to Respondent No.2 to decide the petitioner’s application within thirty days, strictly in accordance with law, after affording him an opportunity of hearing. All listed applications are also disposed of. Office is directed to communicate a copy of this order to Respondent No.2, Secretary Education & Literacy Department, Government of Sindh, Karachi, through all electronic modes for compliance. Judge Judge A.H.Qazi/**
